title: 3 Rubber Jar Opener Grippers & 1 Lid Jar Opener for Seniors with Arthritis, Jar Opener Gripper Pads, Rubber Jar Grippers for Opening Jars and Bottles, Multi Purpose Bottle Lid Openers for Weak Hands
description:
3 Pcs Rubber Gripper Jar Opener Gripper: Made of high-quality rubber material, one-piece molding, strong flexibility. Designed with non-slip ridges, it can create greater friction with the jar lid and provide a firm grip, allowing you to easily open the jar lid
Bottle Lid Openers: Bottle opener is made of ABS resin, with rounded edges and no burrs, making it safer to use. Ergonomically designed, the shape fits the hand better, suitable for rotating round bottle lids with a diameter of 3-7cm/1.18-2.75 inches
Easy to use: You just need to put the rubber bottle opener gripper pad on the top of the bottle and turn it in the indicated direction to easily open the jar. Rubber jar grippers for opening jars provide excellent grip for opening jars and containers of various sizes
Wide Application: The jar opener gripper pad can not only be used as a can opener and a bottle opener for sealed containers, but also suitable for women, people with weak hands, the elderly, arthritis patients, etc, can also be used as an insulation mat, etc
Package Includes: 3 pcs rubber grippers for opening jars, and 1 x can opener, with various sizes to meet your different usage needs. Can be used as round kitchen coasters, anti-scalding mats, wrap hot handles/lids on stoves, etc
reviews_5s: These are seriously the best and most helpful little tools in my kitchen. I’m a small woman who lives alone and I will admit I’m not the strongest person on this planet… that being said, I struggle to open jars and bottles fairly often and have nobody to turn to to help me open them for me! These have saved the day! The pack comes with several options for whatever shape or size you’re trying to open. They all allow for extra grip and control needed to open literally anything. They’re well made and sturdy and easy to clean as well. And for a great price! I’m so happy to have these, they’ve definitely made my life far less frustrating and difficult!
